title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Questions on digital literacy and human connection.

questions.question: Is it easier or harder to make 'real' friends in the digital age?
Do you think governments should regulate what can be posted on social media?

script.text: Some say social media makes us feel more lonely. What is your view?
